name: promptai-homebrew-server
description: PromptAI Security Demo — deliberately vulnerable MCP server with Prompt Security integration

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../web && npm install && cd ../mcp-server && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "MCP-RAW,MCP-SAFE,BACKEND,WEB" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,yellow,green" "cross-env SECURITY_ENABLED=false PORT=8787 node mcp-server/server.js" "cross-env SECURITY_ENABLED=true PORT=8788 node mcp-server/server.js" "node backend/index.js" "cd web && npm run dev"
